scope.title: Access scope
scope.restrictedDesc: Work only inside the chosen folder; terminal disabled
scope.fullDesc: Access the whole computer; terminal allowed
scope.fullWarning: The agent can read/write your files and run commands
scope.confirmFull: Full access lets the agent read/write all files and run terminal commands. Confirm?
scope.confirmInterrupt: A reply is generating; switching will interrupt it. Continue?

memory.title: Memory
memory.sharePrompt: This may help your teammates. Share it as team knowledge?

login.title: Sign in to Echo Agent
login.skip: Skip for now, enter the desktop

chat.welcomeSubtitle: What can I help you with today?
chat.waitingAgent: Waiting for the agent to connect…

analysis.name: Data Analysis
analysis.prompt: I have a dataset and want to analyze it. Help me figure out which angles to start from.

chart.name: Visualize
chart.prompt: Please help me turn the data into charts suitable for visualization, and explain the key point of each.

knowledge.name: Knowledge Q&A
knowledge.prompt: Based on my knowledge base, help me answer the following question:

writing.name: Writing
writing.prompt: Please help me draft some copy on the topic of:

admin.title: Users & Groups
admin.subtitle: Admin
admin.errPasswordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

model.title: Model Configuration
model.serverManaged: Managed by your administrator and cannot be changed locally.
model.overrideAllowed: Local override is allowed. Edit below and save.

localModel.title: Local Model
localModel.intro: Connect to Ollama on this machine so the Agent uses local inference, no network required. When enabled, it takes priority over the server config.
localModel.addressHint: Connect to the loopback address only; do not expose it publicly.
localModel.noModels: No models installed yet. Pull one below.
localModel.pulling: Pulling {{name}}. Large models take a while, please wait…
localModel.enable: Enable local model and restart Agent
localModel.disabledHint: Local model disabled. The server config will be used next start.
localModel.installStep2: 2. After installing, start the service and pull a model in a terminal:

example.title: Example Page
example.description: This page demonstrates the full infrastructure chain: network request (mock), local database, KV storage, toast, logger and i18n. Copy this page to build new ones.
example.dbPlaceholder: Type and press Enter to insert into DB
example.noRecords: No records yet, type something above
